features: Designed to clean hard to reach areas, especially between the teeth.
Provides multi-level bristles for thorough cleaning between the teeth.
It has an angled neck for extra reach.
soft rubber grip for better comfort and control.
description: Product Description Reach interdental toothbrush Twin Pack Reach interdental toothbrush is designed to inaccessible places, in particular to clean between the teeth. Reach interdental toothbrush provides multi-level bristles for thorough cleaning between the teeth. The angled neck provides additional reach and the soft rubber grip for better comfort and control. Directions Wet the toothbrush, apply toothpaste, brush teeth for 2 minutes, and rinse thoroughly Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Replace every 3 months.
